_meta.description: Searchable index of experiment runs extracted from archived changelogs. Round-by-round summaries in docs/reference/experiments-archive.md; raw changelogs were compressed and removed in the 2026-05-25 docs consolidation.

settled_decisions.value: 87D policy obs (26D proprio + 55D temporal history + 6D integral), 24D privileged
p_t(24D) -> static_minmax -> MLP[256,128,64] -> LayerNorm -> softsign -> z(9D)
9 (chosen as baseline r13_A; latent=12 worse than 9, latent=16 chosen for r14 then reverted to r13_A)
Asymmetric critic: cat([o_t, z, p_t]) = 120D -> MLP[512,256,128] (reads privileged 23D/24D directly)
DORAEMON DR curriculum: kl_ub=0.04, performance_lb=90.0, step_interval=250, SLSQP optimizer, log-space Beta, 15D physics-only, binary success criterion
log_std decoupled from TRPO natural gradient into separate Adam optimizer (score-function gradient); essential in low-dim action space where sigma dominates KL budget
Ocean current enabled in production env
Joint PD targets (q_des = q_nominal + action_scale * a_t); evolved absolute EE -> EE position -> delta EE -> Joint PD
Reconstruction auxiliary loss for encoder failed (decoder predicts mean, z collapses); do not re-attempt auxiliary losses on encoder
Baseline locked to r13_A (latent=9) on 2026-04-22 (Phase 0.7 decision); challenger Enc16 disqualified
TCN v1 (H=9, default config) confirmed as student baseline; lambda_latent stays 1.0
No new worktrees for experiments; subclass-based env/runner cfg isolation in main repo only, must full-diff against reference cfg

experiments.change: H=27 dilated conv (1,2,4), RF=15 steps; longer temporal window to test info-limit hypothesis

result.note: BC loss halved and latent MSE -13% but hard att 1.68->1.77 (5% worse), vz 0.043->0.051 (19% worse); head flatten 384->1664; overfits teacher rollouts

experiments.change: lambda_latent 1->5 (bias loss toward matching teacher latent)

result.note: mean-collapse; latent recovery 9.7%->5.3% despite stronger supervision; same failure mode as GRU v5

experiments.change: cosine LR schedule 5e-4 -> 5e-5, 50-iter warmup

result.note: modest help on vz only (0.043->0.034, 20% down) at no BC cost; att equal; does not overcome H=9 ceiling

experiments.change: TCN student encoder H=9 (matches teacher 180ms proprio window), r13_A DR + obs-normalization fix (normfix)

result.note: BC action loss 0.011 (8x lower than GRU v6 0.084) yet hard att stuck at 1.68 vs teacher 1.08; H=9 (0.18s) info/capacity limit; LOCKED as student baseline 2026-04-22

experiments.change: GRU student, hidden 256, deep head 64, BPTT 48, no output LN, exact r13_A HardDR (only DR distribution changed vs v5)

result.note: iter 15 loss_latent 0.0848 already 25% below the 0.11 plateau all of v2-v5 were stuck at; confirms DR mismatch was dominant bottleneck not architecture; still 2-3x teacher gap; recovers teacher roll>>pitch asymmetry (5:1)

experiments.change: v4 config minus final LN(9) output normalization (r14-era DR)

result.note: iter 220 loss_latent 0.113 (identical to v2/v3/v4); grad_norm sustained 0.21-0.27 (3x higher than v4) but loss floor unmoved; LN(9) removal proven inert vs v2 within 5%

experiments.change: hidden 256, deep head, BPTT 48, num_envs 2048 (r14-era DR)

result.note: killed at iter 399; slope iter200-399 -0.006/1000iter; grad_norm dropped 0.46->0.04 by iter 100; capacity doubling + BPTT doubling = zero asymptote change

experiments.change: deep head 128->64->9, hidden 128, BPTT 24 (r14-era DR)

result.note: Q1 loss_latent 0.114, final ~0.108 (5% improvement over v2, within noise)

experiments.change: obs normalized via teacher actor_obs_normalizer + train_hidden threaded per-env through BPTT with done-reset

result.note: Q4 0.113 identical asymptote to killed run; only 10% faster initial descent; eval comparable to TCN H=9, 5-18% better roll/pitch at all DR

experiments.base: r13_A teacher (BC distillation, r14-era DR, no normfix)
experiments.change: TCN H=9 student, no fixes (baseline for GRU comparison)

result.note: loss_latent Q4 0.026 ~4.3x lower than GRU; preferred student arch for this teacher; vz 1.25-5.4x better than GRU; per-dim std matches teacher; superseded by normfix+r13aDR TCN_v1

experiments.change: encoder_latent_dim 9->16 on hist5_act3 env (Phase 0.6 baseline challenger), seed=30, num_envs=2048, 5000 iter

result.note: Phase 0.7 disqualified: pitch regression +208%, yaw +125% at hard DR, 1-env catastrophic outlier with att_lv=+0.976 coupling; baseline stays r13_A; task+code deleted 2026-04-22

experiments.change: hist_len 3->5 (policy_obs_dim 87->113), single-variable, 5000 iter seed=42

result.note: does not beat r13_A; CV heavy-tail vx 241% vz 230%; survival 100%

experiments.change: hist_len 3->10 (policy_obs_dim 87->178), single-variable, 5000 iter seed=42

result.note: vz breakthrough: ss_error 0.018->0.007, CV 231%->69%; only run to win an axis clearly (least-Markovian vz); other axes tied or worse; switching pos_drift best 0.070m

experiments.change: actor obs normalizer EmpiricalNormalization -> nn.LayerNorm, single-variable, 5000 iter seed=42

result.note: fails across the board: pitch 4x worse, lin vel 5-10x worse, yaw 20x worse; structural failure incl seg0; EmpiricalNormalization running mean/var is load-bearing

experiments.change: hist_len 3->5 + hist_action_len 2->3 (policy_obs_dim 87->121), 5000 iter seed=42

result.note: does not beat r13_A; wins vy + settled roll (switching ss_roll 0.59 best); CV heavy-tail vx 292% yaw 183%

experiments.change: entropy_coef 0.003->0.001, DORAEMON step_interval 250->500, HardDR aggressive widening (17 params 1.5-3x), action_latency DR (0,6), OU enabled/doubled, num_envs 2048->4096, max_iterations 5000->20000

result.note: DR widening (commit 1e2d5771) made teacher labels OOD for student BC; r14 removed and r13_A state exactly restored (commit f05ca6f5, byte-identical); never produced a kept policy

experiments.change: latent=9, k_bias=-2.0 (full emabias), ocean_current_strength_range added as DORAEMON-managed HardDR (minimum change from rank-#1 run)

result.note: BASELINE locked 2026-04-22; wins pitch/vx/yaw 1st-or-tied; CV heavy-tail vz 231% roll 184%; commit f05ca6f5 / bafe23f4

experiments.change: latent=16 + k_bias=-2.0 (full strength) + ocean DR (clean ablation r12_baseline did not do with k_bias=-1.0)

result.note: wins roll SS edge, roll heavy-tail %>10deg 28%->19% at hard, yaw peak 1.61->0.83, pos p99 0.57->0.42m; chosen as r14 baseline then r14 reverted; latent=16 has 20x stronger roll limit-cycle amplitude than r13_A

experiments.change: latent 9->16 + emabias k_bias=-1.0 (half of r11_emabias -2.0); first test of latent=16 + emabias combination

result.note: REGRESSED (rank #7 vs r11_encdim16 #2); first run launched with k_bias=-2.0 then killed at 22min, relaunched 2026-04-20_13-24-19 with k_bias=-1.0; failure cause ambiguous (weak bias vs inherent latent16+emabias interaction)

experiments.change: encoder_latent_dim 9->12 (midpoint of 9 and 16), no emabias (commit 176e2d3f)

result.note: latent=12 NOT a sweet spot; 16 wins yaw overshoot and hard-DR attitude; built on r12_baseline base so confounded; 0% peak>20deg heavy-tail

experiments.change: add EMA bias penalty reward, k_bias=-2.0, alpha=0.99 (100-step window), per-axis weights roll 1.5 others 1.0 (commit a69723f3)

result.note: demonstrably best run across all 24 runs; wins roll all 4 DR (-11 to -31%), hard yaw -55% ss_error -88% std -61% n_gt20; pitch regression +14% train; became r13_A config

experiments.change: encoder latent_dim 9->16 (commit 402cb5c7), run 2026-04-19_11-26-59

result.note: roll 0.900->0.480 + std 1.74->0.55; trades lin_vel for attitude (lin_vel reward -37%, vz SS +87%, vx +60%); policy entropy +94%; real trade-off not variance

experiments.change: fold in r9_tightrates thresholds (rp_rate 0.5, yaw_rate 0.55) + payload_cog_offset_xy_radius 0.15->0.08 (commit 417810ce); reference baseline from R11 onward

result.note: caps gravity torque tail; removes physically-impossible payload combos exceeding roll TAM authority (1.4 Nm); reference for R11 feature ablations

experiments.change: add yaw_rate_dot_cost average constraint, threshold 0.8 rad/s^2, budget 0.10 (commit 4cc2eede)

result.note: catastrophic training failure: yaw 100% peak>threshold; excluded from variance ranking; skewed intervention divergence stats

experiments.change: thruster min_std floor 0.05->0.03 (arm 0.10 kept) (rsl_rl_ppo_cfg.py:213)

result.note: thruster floor injects ~0.035 Nm random roll torque forcing during SS; predicted roll jitter -30%, SS -15%

experiments.change: DORAEMON performance_lb 90->180 (config.py:378)

result.note: DORAEMON success saturated at 0.98+ from iter 500; perf_lb gated nothing; prediction success falls to 0.6-0.8 mid-training; max yaw env-std among r9-r11 runs
roll SS 1.090->0.829 (-24%, beats r8_gated 0.855), roll jitter -51%, yaw OS 21.2->15.3% (-28%); only regression vx SS +24%; constraint slack WAS permitting SS oscillation; folded into r11_baseline

experiments.change: control run on r8_gated config, fresh retrain (2026-04-18_21-27-44), 5000 iter

result.note: roll SS +28% vs r8_gated 0.855 = ~30% run-to-run seed variance bound; survival 100%; reward decayed 267->216 (-19%)
vs r9_baseline: roll jitter -33%, roll SS -3%, roll OS -21%, vy SS +44% (roll-sway coupling regression), yaw OS 21.2->18.9%; reward weight controls oscillation amplitude not SS floor

experiments.change: normalize_value=True (HORA-style running mean/std for critic targets, previously-disabled path)

result.note: killed at iter ~230; wrapper _compute_returns_with_value_norm silently skipped cost GAE -> cost_returns=0, IPO barrier gradients=0, degenerated to unconstrained PPO (cost_val=2.4e-10); method-override scoping bug, fixed and relaunched

experiments.change: Error-gated 6D integral integration (accumulate only when |err| < sigma)

result.note: best policy of rounds R1-R8; only config improving SS error and overshoot simultaneously; checkpoint LOST in log cleanup, needs retraining; yaw OS sole remaining weakness

experiments.change: TRPO+IPO + asymmetric encoder (15D->9D), no sigma decoupling (334 iters)

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; TRPO consumed KL budget reducing sigma instead of improving mean; encoder z_std constant (no learning); killed

experiments.change: sigma decoupling applied (log_std separate Adam, std_lr=3e-3) (248 iters)

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; noise_std decay slowed (0.0036->0.0022/iter); encoder z_std still constant ~0.45 (not learning); enc grad too small in TRPO

experiments.change: ran to completion 637 iters, original settings

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; encoding COLLAPSE (most DR params lost 60-80% sensitivity); noise_std hit floor 0.2 at ~500 iter then roll improvement slowed 5x

experiments.change: encoder params separated from _policy_params into own Adam (lr=3e-3) with post-TRPO re-snapshot (270 iters, killed)

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; FAILED, enc_grad dropped 85% (0.040->0.006); actor->z gradient path too weak when decoupled; worse encoding than TRPO-coupled

experiments.change: encoder back in TRPO, std_lr 3e-3->1e-3, min_std 0.2->0.01

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; z sweep sensitivity INCREASING (Body Mass 0.51->1.01); slower noise_std decay = richer encoder gradient; std_lr=1e-3 and min_std=0.01 adopted

experiments.change: asymmetric critic sees z + p_t, no LayerNorm

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; shortcut problem confirmed: critic ignores z for p_t, z_std->1 instantly, encoder no gradient; confounded with saturation

experiments.change: pre-softsign LayerNorm between encoder MLP output and softsign (500 iters)

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; z saturation eliminated (|z|>0.9 from 44% to ~0%); encoder learns (Body Mass 12/13 active); still worse than hist-only (roll 8.74, pitch 6.54)

experiments.change: asymmetric critic + LayerNorm to isolate shortcut from saturation (500 iters)

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; encoder DOES learn via actor gradient alone (shortcut not total); broader DR sensitivity than shared backbone; still no performance gain over hist-only

experiments.change: entropy_coef=0.001 to fight noise_std collapse (500 iters)

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; roll WORSENED (9.77->13.59), pitch slightly better; entropy bonus interfered with exploitation

experiments.change: reduced encoder input 15D->6D output, no ocean current

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; severe instability at 145 iters; compression ratio 2.5:1 too aggressive

experiments.change: encoder input 15D->9D output (compression 1.67:1), asymmetric+LN, no ocean current (500 iters)

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; much better than 6D; improved CoG Z (3.5x), CoB Z (2.9x), Lin Damp Roll sensitivity; still worse than hist-only; noise_std collapse common bottleneck

experiments.change: shared backbone (critic uses z only, not raw privileged), online end-to-end PPO (342 iters)

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; first stable online encoder training since ablation Steps 5a-5b; encoder learns DR info but most z dims near softsign boundary (~2-3 effective dims of 13); pitch +2.85 vs hist-only

experiments.change: frozen encoder: auto-load static min-max norm bounds from checkpoint + z_init_scale 0.01->1.0

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; norm bug fix: saturated dims 13/13->0/13, active pairs 0/299->116/299; affected ALL prior frozen encoder experiments; z=1.0 improved roll 0.41 deg over z=0.01; still does not beat hist-only (roll 9.78)

experiments.change: 3 fixes: advantage recompute removal, critic obs cat([o_t,hist,p_t])=277D, HORA-style value denormalization during rollout

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; fixed noise_std explosion; best comparable to hist-only (roll 7.0) but encoder z not yet measurable advantage; all prior encoder experiments Steps 4-19 had 37D critic bug

experiments.change: offline supervised encoder training with value-prediction bottleneck p_t(23D)->MLP->softsign->z(13D)

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; pivot after 15+ online encoder experiments failed; z explains 70.3% additional V_critic variance (R^2 0.088->0.791); root cause of online failure: sample().clamp(-1,1) amplifies KL 100x

experiments.change: 20+ experiments isolating why encoder destabilizes training; 10 hypotheses tested

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; root cause = sample().clamp(-1,1) in act() (KL 100x amplification -> adaptive LR death); removing clamp (Step 17) fixed KL but noise_std exploded via env-level clamp feedback; summary in docs/reference/experiments-archive.md (encoder ablation)

experiments.change: absolute joint target -> delta accumulation (q_des += delta_scale * a_t); torque cost uses applied_torque post-clamp (139 iters)

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; delta action solved dynamics (effort 91%->2.2%, torque cost 92->4.5 within budget) at cost of slower attitude convergence; absolute was 17/13 deg

experiments.change: 6 structural fixes aligning ConstraintTRPO with NORBC paper (Muller et al ICML 2025): LS logging, cost critic plain MSE, encoder LS gating removed, encoder in TRPO trust region, 1/(1-gamma) IPO barrier factor, per-constraint cost adv standardization

result.note: DEPRECATED-PROJECT; reward 2x improvement; z saturation eliminated [-0.99,0.99]->[-0.53,0.40]; barrier_alpha 0.02->0.05
